# VoxoMix

> VoxoMix is an offline, privacy-first desktop app for musicians. It uses on-device AI to split any song into stems (vocals, drums, bass, guitar, piano), detect chords and BPM, transcribe lyrics, and shift pitch or tempo — all locally, with no upload to any server. Built for home musicians and beginner instrumentalists to practice, and for producers to work with stems. Runs on Mac and Windows.

## What makes VoxoMix different
- **Fully offline / on-device**: songs, chords, lyrics and melodies never leave your computer — nothing is uploaded to any server.
- **All-in-one practice studio**: stem separation + chord detection + lyrics + pitch/tempo shift + metronome + song-structure analysis + a record channel, in one app (competitors split these across cloud tools).
- **No signup, no queue**: download and start free; Apple-notarized native app.

## Core features
- AI stem separation: vocals, drums, bass, guitar, piano
- Real-time pitch shift / transpose (tempo preserved)
- Automatic chord detection (piano and guitar)
- Automatic lyrics transcription
- BPM detection, metronome, and song-structure bar
- Record channel: record your own playing into the song (with headphone monitoring) and export it as WAV
- Instrument tuner
- Export: MP3, lossless WAV, MIDI, and PDF chord sheets

## Platforms
- macOS (Apple Silicon: M1–M5), .dmg
- Windows 10/11, .exe

## Pricing
- Free: $0 — 2 songs/month, 4-channel separation, chord finder (piano)
- Basic: $2.99/mo — 10 songs/month, 6-channel, lyrics, transpose, MP3 export
- Student: $8.99/mo — 50 songs/month, chords (piano+guitar), tuner, PDF export
- Producer: $13.99/mo — unlimited songs, lossless WAV, MIDI, batch export, all features
- 14-day free Producer trial. Cancel anytime.

## Best for (use cases)
- Practicing an instrument by isolating or muting parts of any song, then recording yourself in place of the muted part
- Slowing a song down without changing its pitch to learn a part
- Finding the chords and lyrics of a song to play along
- Producers extracting clean stems for remixing or sampling
- Musicians who want a private, offline alternative to cloud-based stem separation and chord-finding tools
